backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Vehicle, Variant, Color, BlogPost, Promotion, Testimonial, Visit, AdminUser, etc.) and including MixinStorage for blob storage and MixinAuthorization for access control with initialized state.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and layouts describing their functionality and data flow.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with public routes (Beranda, Mobil Keluarga, Mobil Niaga, Promo, Blog, Kontak, Simulasi Kredit) and admin routes protected by AuthGuard, plus QueryClient and ThemeProvider setup.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog component for creating and editing admin users with form fields for name, email, and principal ID (create only), using useCreateAdminUser and useUpdateAdminUser hooks with fixed super_admin role.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component displaying admin users with email, name, role badge, and action buttons for edit/delete, with delete disabled when only one admin remains to prevent lockout.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component for selecting banner images (main or CTA) from available media assets, displaying images in a radio-group grid with filtering for image MIME types only.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A dialog form component for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields, including delegation identity validation and token expiry checks before submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: A table component displaying all blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions, including confirmation dialogs for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: A grid component displaying media assets (images and PDFs) with copy ID and delete actions, creating blob URLs from canister storage data and validating delegation identity before deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload component supporting images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) and PDFs with size validation, progress tracking, and delegation identity validation before upload.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog component for creating and editing passenger vehicles with form fields for vehicle name, description, and base price. Uses custom hooks for create/update mutations and manages form state with validation.
Table component displaying all vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes loading skeletons, empty state, and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Dialog component for creating and editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps for backend compatibility.
Table component displaying all promotions with period dates, active status toggle, edit and delete actions. Includes loading states, empty state, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Dialog component for creating and editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range and manages timestamp for new testimonials.
Table component displaying all testimonials with customer name, content preview, star rating visualization, and edit/delete actions. Includes loading skeletons and empty state message.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Displays a horizontal bar chart of the top 10 most visited pages using Recharts, with loading skeleton and empty state handling. Truncates long URLs for display while showing full URLs in tooltips.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts, with date formatting in Indonesian locale. Includes loading and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that validates Internet Identity delegation, checks for anonymous principals, and redirects to login if identity is missing or expired, with loading states during initialization.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a static list of 5 latest articles with navigation to individual blog post pages. Each article is rendered as a clickable card with an icon.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and menu buttons. Includes a dropdown menu overlay with site navigation links.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Button group selector for commercial vehicle variants that notifies parent component of selection changes. Auto-selects the first variant on mount.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Full-width banner component with overlay text promoting special offers and a WhatsApp CTA button. Supports custom banner images from website settings or falls back to a static asset.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer with company info, contact details, social media links, and real-time visitor statistics. Displays visitor count, page views, and online users with auto-refresh every 15 seconds.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero banner that displays different titles, icons, and subtexts based on the current route pathname. Supports family vehicles, commercial vehicles, promos, testimonials, blog, contact, and credit simulation pages.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Carousel section displaying up to 8 family vehicle catalogs using a responsive carousel component. Shows loading state while fetching vehicle data.
Displays a carousel of up to 8 commercial vehicles (Mobil Niaga) using vehicle catalog data and VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main hero banner with a customizable background image from website settings or a fallback static asset, overlaid with Mitsubishi Motors branding text.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu, and mobile hamburger menu that links to main site sections (home, vehicles, promo, testimonials, blog, contact).
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Provides like and share buttons for vehicle products with counters, integrating native share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of the first 4 featured vehicles from the catalog as "Produk Unggulan" (Featured Products).
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Search input component that redirects to the family vehicles page with a search query parameter when submitted.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section showcasing three key selling points: flexible installments, low down payment, and negotiable pricing with icons.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static "About Us" section describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an official dealer with commitment to service and financing solutions.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component for choosing vehicle variants and colors, triggering a callback when selections change.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, base price, and a link to the detail page with a slug-based URL.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language labels, validation messages, and user feedback messages for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook for fetching admin dashboard statistics (vehicles, contacts, leads, blog posts, visitors), currently returning default zeros as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for admin user CRUD operations (get all, get by principal, create, update, delete) with authentication and network error handling, though backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all, get by ID, create, update, delete) with error handling and toast notifications, though backend methods are stubbed and not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for commercial vehicle category CRUD operations (get all, get by ID, create, update, delete), returning empty/null data as backend methods are not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting contact form data, though the backend method is not implemented; includes backward compatibility alias.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch all contact submissions, returning an empty array as the backend method is not implemented; includes backward compatibility alias.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting credit simulation data (vehicle ID, amount, term), though the backend method is not implemented; includes backward compatibility alias.
Provides a query hook to fetch all credit simulations, returning an empty array as the backend method is not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for media asset operations (get all, get by ID, upload, delete) with progress tracking, authentication/network error handling, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for product like/share functionality (get counts, like, share) with a combined hook for backward compatibility, though backend methods are not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions with authentication and network error handling; currently stubbed with empty implementations awaiting backend integration.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: React Query hooks for fetching vehicle catalogs and individual vehicle catalog data; currently returns empty/null data as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook for fetching website settings; currently returns null as backend implementation is pending.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials with authentication and network error handling; currently stubbed with empty implementations awaiting backend integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: React Query hooks for CRUD operations on vehicles with authentication and network error handling; currently stubbed with empty implementations awaiting backend integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: React Query hooks for fetching visitor statistics, trends, and page views; getVisitorStats is implemented while trend and page view endpoints are disabled pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that now defers to PublicLayout for primary tracking; kept for backward compatibility only.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and updating website settings with authentication validation and error handling; includes proper formatting of optional bigint fields for banner images.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout component with collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile support, and logout functionality. Includes menu items for dashboard, vehicles, promo, testimonials, blog, media, leads, statistics, settings, and admin users.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that includes Navbar, conditional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar. Implements visitor tracking on page navigation using session IDs, device detection, and browser fingerprinting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component.
Admin user management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete functionality using Principal-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Blog post management page with add/edit dialog and list view, includes cache invalidation on successful operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder page for commercial vehicles management that currently redirects users to the family vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Displays a sortable table of credit simulations submitted by visitors, showing vehicle ID, amount, tenor, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard displaying statistics cards for passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and total visitors.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays contact form submissions in a sortable table showing name, email, message, and timestamp with date formatting.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Media management interface with upload zone and asset grid, includes cache invalidation on successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles (Mobil Keluarga) with add/edit functionality via dialog and list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit functionality via dialog and list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit/delete functionality, including a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard displaying visitor statistics (total, daily, weekly, monthly, yearly, online now, page views) with auto-refresh every 15 seconds and trend/top pages charts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for configuring website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, and banner images with validation and image preview functionality.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication with loading states, error handling, and automatic redirect to admin dashboard upon successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage composing multiple sections: main banner, vehicle highlights, CTA banner, about us, features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article details, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form for submitting inquiries (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, down payment, tenor, message) and contact information display.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public detail page for a specific passenger vehicle showing images, price, variant/color selector, product interactions, specifications, and features tabs.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page displaying up to 8 published passenger vehicles in a grid layout using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Displays a grid of commercial vehicles filtered by category slug from URL params, showing up to 8 published vehicles using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Shows detailed vehicle information including images, variants, pricing, specifications, and features with tabs; includes product interactions and action buttons for contacting sales, credit simulation, and brochure download.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Landing page displaying three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to category-specific pages.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page indicating promotions section is under development with a message to contact sales for current offers.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form that calculates estimated monthly installments based on vehicle selection, down payment, and tenor; submits simulation requests to backend.
Placeholder page indicating testimonials section is under development with a thank you message.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: TypeScript type definitions for frontend use matching backend types including Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleImage, Specification, Feature, Promotion, Testimonial, BlogPost, MediaAsset, WebsiteSettings, AdminUser, ContactSubmission, CreditSimulation, VisitorStats, and CommercialVehicleCategory.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting MediaAsset Uint8Array blob data from canister storage into browser-displayable blob URLs and determining asset types from MIME types.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Calculates monthly loan installments using 8% annual interest rate based on vehicle price, down payment, and tenor in months.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and parameter cleanup from URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides validation functions for forms (email, phone, URL, numeric, length) and delegation identity authentication, returning error messages in Indonesian or null if valid.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Implements visitor tracking utilities including session ID generation/retrieval, device/browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting a refactoring task to standardize Website Settings endpoint authentication by replacing manual session validation with validateSession() call pattern used in Media endpoint.
